news_items.headline: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
news_items.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski's ASG status in doubt due to schedule
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski is in line to start the Sunday before the All-Star break, which would make him ineligible to pitch in the All-Star Game two nights later.

news_items.headline: Braves bring back IF Jarvis, designate 1B Tellez
news_items.summary: The Braves recalled infielder Jim Jarvis from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday and designated veteran first baseman Rowdy Tellez for assignment.

news_items.headline: A's prospect Lasko facing 'lengthy' recovery
news_items.summary: Athletics prospect Ryan Lasko, who broke his back in a frightening collision with a minor league teammate Tuesday, posted on social media Thursday that he faces a "lengthy" recovery but hopes to return to baseball.

news_items.headline: Swanson stays hot with 3 HRs, 8 RBIs in 23-3 win
news_items.summary: Dansby Swanson's historic day included a grand slam and the most RBIs by a Cubs player since Sammy Sosa had nine in 2002.

news_items.headline: Mets' Cohen on firing Stearns: 'Not gonna do it'
news_items.summary: Mets owner Steve Cohen said Wednesday that he is not considering dismissing president of baseball operations David Stearns, who is in the third year of a five-year contract, despite a second straight disappointing season.

news_items.headline: GameThread: Detroit Tigers vs. Texas Rangers, 8:05 p.m.
news_items.summary: Detroit Tigers (38-49) vs. Texas Rangers (44-43) Time/Place: 8:05 p.m., Globe Life FieldSB Nation Site: Lone Star BallMedia: Detroit SportsNet, MLB.TV, Tigers Radio NetworkPitching Matchup: LHP Framber Valdez (4-5, 4.05 ERA) vs. RHP Nathan Eovaldi (8-7, 3.95 ERA)

news_items.headline: Arizona Diamondbacks Series Preview # 29: Diamondbacks vs Brewers
news_items.summary: The Brewers care about when to challenge ball/strike calls. In spring training, they tested a system that involved green index cards that were posted in the dugout in the best situations to challenge. Apparently, MLB told them to stop posting cards. An unique suspension. Brewers relief pitcher Abner Uribe was suspended for one game (served […]

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Atlanta Braves Thursday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will finish up their stay in Atlanta before heading to the (not so) friendly confines of Wrigley Field for the 4th of July weekend. Dustin May will make the start for the Cardinals while the Atlanta Braves will send Hurston Waldrep to the mound. First pitch at Truist Park is once […]
